pipes.pipe.pipesourceparameters.CfnAbout: The parameters required to set up a source for your pipe.

pipes.pipe.pipesourceparameters.ActiveMQ.Description: The parameters for using an Active MQ broker as a source.

pipes.pipe.pipesourceparameters.DynamoDB.Description: The parameters for using a DynamoDB stream as a source.

pipes.pipe.pipesourceparameters.FilterCr.Description: The collection of event patterns used to filter events.  To remove a filter, specify a `FilterCriteria` object with an empty array of `Filter` objects.  For more information, see [Events and Event Patterns](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/eventbridge/latest/userguide/eventbridge-and-event-patterns.html) in the *Amazon EventBridge User Guide*.

pipes.pipe.pipesourceparameters.KinesisS.Description: The parameters for using a Kinesis stream as a source.

pipes.pipe.pipesourceparameters.ManagedS.Description: The parameters for using an MSK stream as a source.

pipes.pipe.pipesourceparameters.RabbitMQ.Description: The parameters for using a Rabbit MQ broker as a source.

pipes.pipe.pipesourceparameters.SelfMana.Description: The parameters for using a self-managed Apache Kafka stream as a source.

pipes.pipe.pipesourceparameters.SqsQueue.Description: The parameters for using a Amazon SQS stream as a source.
